src: Compose Media Player is a video player library designed for Compose Multiplatform, supporting multiple platforms including Android, macOS, Windows, Linux, iOS and Compose Web
ja: Compose Media PlayerはCompose Multiplatform向けの動画プレーヤーライブラリで、Android、macOS、Windows、Linux、iOS、Compose Webを含む複数プラットフォームをサポートします
